title: Bill Signing Ceremony for HB 123 “State Recognition of Tribes”
summary: ANCHORAGE, AK – The Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) is pleased to celebrate the signing of House Bill 123 – Providing for State Recognition of Tribes.
